medium_findings.code_snippet: chatPanel = vscode.window.createWebviewPanel('revagentChat', 'Revagent Chat', vscode.ViewColumn.Beside, { enableScripts: true, retainContextWhenHidden: true });

medium_findings.description: Publisher domain is NOT verified by Microsoft
Webview panel with scripts enabled (potential C2 channel)
Harvesting VSCode configuration and sending over network

info_findings.description: No domain associated with publisher profile
